svg.text: + Iterative — no recursion-depth limits on long DAGs.
+ Natural for parallel "wave" scheduling: indegree-0 set is independent.
+ Easy to enforce tie-breaking (heap for lex-smallest order).
+ Stops early on cycle: queue empties before all V vertices output.
- Doesn't compute SCC, post-order, or low-link values as a byproduct.
Default for build systems, scheduling, and parallel pipelines.
+ Three-color marking detects cycles directly (gray-on-stack edge).
+ Post-order is the building block for SCC (Kosaraju), articulation points, bridges.
- Recursion-depth issues on long DAGs (10⁵+ vertices in a chain).
- Order is determined by adjacency-list iteration order — less deterministic for tie-breaking.
Default for compiler analysis and SCC pipelines that need post-order anyway.
